display.purpose: Page-level headings — Dashboard title, section openers.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal headers, group names.

body.purpose: Standard reading text across the app.

mono.purpose: Monetary amounts, wallet addresses, settlement values.

shadows.name: ambient-sm
shadows.purpose: Default card state — barely perceptible lift from page background.

shadows.name: ambient-elevated
shadows.purpose: Card hover — blue-tinted to signal actionability.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Interactive transitions — hover, focus, card lift.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action — use sparingly, one per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0052FF; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; user-select: none; transition: box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,82,255,0.30); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); transition-duration: 0.05s; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #FFFFFF; color: #0F172A; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; user-select: none; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #0052FF; color: #0052FF; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); transition-duration: 0.05s; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none !important; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #64748B; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; user-select: none; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F1F4F9; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); transition-duration: 0.05s; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #DC2626; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; user-select: none; transition: filter 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { filter: brightness(1.15); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(220,38,38,0.30); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.97); transition-duration: 0.05s; } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container — flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html:
Trip to Paris

5 members · Jun 2026
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), border-color 0.25s ease; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,82,255,0.08), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: #BFDBFE; } .ds-card:active { transform: translateY(0); transition-duration: 0.05s; } .ds-card-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; background: #EFF6FF; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #0F172A; margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #64748B; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0F172A; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0052FF; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,82,255,0.12); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748B; } .ds-input:user-invalid { border-color: #DC2626; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,0.15); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status indicator — currency, demo, category tags.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: #EFF6FF; color: #0052FF; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Top navigation bar with transparent backdrop.
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; height: 56px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.30); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: #0F172A; } .ds-nav-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-nav-btn { background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.25rem; padding: 4px; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { background: #F1F4F9; }

narrative.overview:
StableSplit treats money like a trusted companion — warm, clear, and never intimidating. Every surface is organized but not sterile, precise but not cold. The interface breathes with purpose: enough personality to feel human, enough restraint to inspire confidence where it matters most — on the numbers.

Density is moderate but airy. Cards have gentle rounded corners (14px) and lift on interaction with a spring-backed hover. The blue primary is confident without being aggressive — it leads the eye to actions without shouting. The palette stays tightly focused: one primary blue, three semantic colors, and a neutral family that leans slightly cool in light mode and decisively dark in dark mode.
keyCharacteristics: Warm approachability through typography (DM Sans) and spring easings, not through warm-tinted backgrounds
Confidence through the blue primary — used sparingly, mostly on interactive elements
Structural elevation — flat by default, shadows appear on interaction
Tactile feedback — press scale, hover lift, spring easing on every interactive element
Dark mode with its own distinct character (cool deep grays, not inverted light mode)

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Confidence Blue is the only accent. It appears on primary CTAs, links, and focus indicators — never as decorative fill or background gradient. Its presence means 'interact here.'

rules.name: The Cold Canvas Rule
rules.body: The page background in light mode (Cool Breeze, #F8F9FC) is not warm. Warmth is carried by the DM Sans typeface, the 14px corner radius, the spring easing, and the emoji category badges. Not by beige or cream.

rules.name: The Numbers Rule
rules.body: All currency amounts, balances, and token values use Space Mono. Numbers are the source of truth.

rules.name: The Earned Shadow Rule
rules.body: No shadows at rest. Cards, buttons, and surfaces are flat until the user interacts. Every shadow is a response, not decoration.

dos: Do use Confidence Blue (#0052FF) sparingly — on primary actions, links, and focus indicators only.
Do use Space Mono for all monetary amounts, wallet addresses, and numeric data.
Do keep the page background cool (Cool Breeze #F8F9FC in light, Midnight #0F0F0F in dark).
Do spring easing (var(--ease-spring)) on interactive transitions.
Do use scale(0.97) on active press with instant duration (0.05s).
Do test body text contrast at ≥4.5:1.
Do respect reduced motion — all animations collapse to instant via prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px colored) on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't add ambient shadows at rest. Every shadow is earned by interaction.
Don't pair two geometric sans-serifs or two humanist sans-serifs.
Don't use glassmorphism as default styling.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above sections.
Don't hard-code colors that exist as design tokens.
Don't animate layout properties — stick to transform and opacity.
